---
output:
  word_document: default
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---



```{r}
pheno_data <- read.table("alcohol_phenotypes_full.csv", header = TRUE, skip = 1, sep = ",")
```



```{r,echo=FALSE}

pheno_data$birthdate <- as.Date(pheno_data$birthdate)

pheno_data$alcoholConsumption_updateDate <- as.POSIXct(
  pheno_data$alcoholConsumption_updateDate, 
  format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"
)

pheno_data$age <- as.numeric(
  difftime(pheno_data$alcoholConsumption_updateDate, 
           pheno_data$birthdate, 
           units = "days") / 365.25
)

pheno_data$age <- floor(pheno_data$age)
```


```{r}
prs_data <- read.table("merged_PRS_pheno.txt", header = TRUE)
```



```{r}
names(prs_data)[1] <- "IID"
merged_data <- merge(pheno_data, prs_data, by = "IID")
merged_data$gender_binary <- ifelse(pheno_data$gender == "male", 1, 0)
```



```{r,echo=FALSE}
cat("Dataset shape (rows, columns):", dim(merged_data), "\n\n")

cat("Column names:\n")
print(colnames(merged_data))
cat("\n")


cat("Data types:\n")
print(sapply(merged_data, class))
cat("\n")

cat("Missing values per column (where > 0):\n")
missing_vals <- colSums(is.na(merged_data))
print(missing_vals[missing_vals > 0])
cat("\n")


audit_cols <- grep("AUDIT|audit", colnames(merged_data), value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)

if (length(audit_cols) > 0) {
  for (col in audit_cols) {
    if (col %in% colnames(merged_data)) {
      cat("AUDIT score statistics for", col, ":\n")
      print(summary(merged_data[[col]]))
      cat("Mean:", mean(merged_data[[col]], na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
      cat("SD:", sd(merged_data[[col]], na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
      cat("Min:", min(merged_data[[col]], na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
      cat("Max:", max(merged_data[[col]], na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
      cat("\n")
    }
  }
} else {
 
  cat("No AUDIT columns found. Summary of numeric columns:\n")
  numeric_summary <- summary(merged_data[sapply(merged_data, is.numeric)])
  print(numeric_summary)
}
```


```{r}
merged_data <- na.omit(merged_data)
```



```{r}
merged_data$AUDIT_consumption <- merged_data$alcoholConsumption + merged_data$alcoholVolume + merged_data$alcoholExtremeConsumptionFrequency
merged_data$AUDIT_dependence <- merged_data$alcoholCantStop + merged_data$alcoholBrokenPromise + merged_data$alcoholHangoverDrinking
merged_data$AUDIT_problems <- merged_data$alcoholGuiltyFeeling + merged_data$alcoholMemoryLoss + merged_data$alcoholInjuries + merged_data$alcoholReductionRecommendations
```


```{r,echo=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
summary_stats <- merged_data %>%
  summarise(
    consumption_mean = mean(AUDIT_consumption, na.rm = TRUE),
    consumption_sd = sd(AUDIT_consumption, na.rm = TRUE),
    dependence_mean = mean(AUDIT_dependence, na.rm = TRUE),
    dependence_sd = sd(AUDIT_dependence, na.rm = TRUE),
    problems_mean = mean(AUDIT_problems, na.rm = TRUE),
    problems_sd = sd(AUDIT_problems, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

print(summary_stats)


par(mfrow = c(1, 3))
print(hist(merged_data$AUDIT_consumption, main = "AUDIT Consumption", xlab = "Score"))
hist(merged_data$AUDIT_dependence, main = "AUDIT Dependence", xlab = "Score")
hist(merged_data$AUDIT_problems, main = "AUDIT Problems", xlab = "Score")
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
```


```{r,echo=FALSE}

subscales_df <- data.frame(
  AUDIT_consumption = merged_data$alcoholConsumption + merged_data$alcoholCantStop + merged_data$alcoholHangoverDrinking,
  AUDIT_dependence = merged_data$alcoholBrokenPromise + merged_data$alcoholGuiltyFeeling + merged_data$alcoholMemoryLoss,
  AUDIT_problems = merged_data$alcoholInjuries + merged_data$alcoholReductionRecommendations
)


correlation_matrix <- cor(subscales_df, use = "complete.obs")
print("\nКорреляционная матрица между подшкалами:")
print(correlation_matrix)



# install.packages("ggplot2")
# install.packages("reshape2")
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)


melted_corr <- melt(correlation_matrix)


ggplot(data = melted_corr, aes(x = Var1, y = Var2, fill = value)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", high = "red", mid = "white", 
                       midpoint = 0, limit = c(-1, 1), space = "Lab",
                       name = "Корреляция\nПирсона") +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(value, 2)), color = "black", size = 4) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank()) +
  coord_fixed() +
  ggtitle("Матрица корреляций: подшкалы AUDIT")
```



```{r,echo=FALSE}

hist(merged_data$audit_score, breaks = 50, 
     main = "Распределение баллов AUDIT",
     xlab = "AUDIT Total Score", 
     ylab = "Frequency",
     col = "lightblue",
     border = "black")


median_score <- median(merged_data$audit_score, na.rm = TRUE)
low_threshold <- quantile(merged_data$audit_score, probs = 0.33, na.rm = TRUE)
high_threshold <- quantile(merged_data$audit_score, probs = 0.67, na.rm = TRUE)


merged_data$AUDIT_group <- cut(merged_data$audit_score,
                               breaks = c(-Inf, low_threshold, high_threshold, Inf),
                               labels = c('Low (Control)', 'Intermediate', 'High (Cases)'))


library(ggplot2)

ggplot(merged_data, aes(x = audit_score, fill = AUDIT_group)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, alpha = 0.6, color = "black") +
  labs(x = "AUDIT Total Score", 
       y = "Frequency", 
       title = "AUDIT Score Distribution by Group") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Low (Control)" = "blue", 
                               "Intermediate" = "green", 
                               "High (Cases)" = "red"))


print("\nGroup sizes:")
print(table(merged_data$AUDIT_group))

print("\nGroup percentages:")
group_proportions <- prop.table(table(merged_data$AUDIT_group)) * 100
print(group_proportions)


merged_data$phenotype_binary <- as.integer(merged_data$audit_score >= high_threshold)

print("\nBinary phenotype:")
print(paste("Cases (high AUDIT):", sum(merged_data$phenotype_binary, na.rm = TRUE)))
print(paste("Controls (low AUDIT):", sum(merged_data$phenotype_binary == 0, na.rm = TRUE)))
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)


df_pie <- as.data.frame(table(merged_data$AUDIT_group))
colnames(df_pie) <- c("Group", "Count")

df_pie$Percentage <- df_pie$Count / sum(df_pie$Count) * 100


df_pie$Label <- paste0(df_pie$Group, "\n",
                       round(df_pie$Percentage, 1), "%\n",
                       "n=", df_pie$Count)

ggplot(df_pie, aes(x = "", y = Count, fill = Group)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1, color = "white") +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  
  
  geom_text(aes(label = Label),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            size = 4) +
  

  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Low (Control)" = "#A8DADC",   
    "Intermediate" = "#FFE5B4",    
    "High (Cases)" = "#FFADAD"       
  )) +
  
  labs(title = "AUDIT Score Distribution by Group") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none"  
  )
```


```{r}
merged_data$AUDIT_zone <- cut(
  merged_data$audit_score,
  breaks = c(-Inf, 7, 15, 19, Inf),
  labels = c("Zone 1 (AUDIT = 0–7)", 
             "Zone 2 (AUDIT = 8–15)", 
             "Zone 3 (AUDIT = 16–19)", 
             "Zone 4 (AUDIT = 20–40)")
)

df_pie <- as.data.frame(table(merged_data$AUDIT_zone))
colnames(df_pie) <- c("Zone", "Count")

df_pie$Percentage <- df_pie$Count / sum(df_pie$Count) * 100

df_pie$Label <- paste0(df_pie$Zone, "\n",
                       round(df_pie$Percentage, 1), "%\n",
                       "n=", df_pie$Count)

library(ggplot2)
library(ggplot2)


df_pie <- as.data.frame(table(merged_data$AUDIT_zone))
colnames(df_pie) <- c("Zone", "Count")

df_pie$Percentage <- df_pie$Count / sum(df_pie$Count) * 100


df_pie$LegendLabel <- paste0(
  df_pie$Zone," - ",
  round(df_pie$Percentage, 1), "%"
)

ggplot(df_pie, aes(x = "", y = Count, fill = LegendLabel)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1, color = "white") +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  
  
  scale_fill_manual(values = setNames(
  c("#A8DADC", 
      "#B7E4C7", 
      "#CDB4DB",
      "#FFADAD" ),
  df_pie$LegendLabel
)) +
  
  labs(title = "AUDIT Score Distribution by Clinical Zones",
       fill = "AUDIT Zones") +
  
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )
```
```{r}
library(ggplot2)


merged_data$AUDIT_zone <- factor(
  merged_data$AUDIT_zone,
  levels = c("Zone 1 (AUDIT = 0–7)", 
             "Zone 2 (AUDIT = 8–15)", 
             "Zone 3 (AUDIT = 16–19)", 
             "Zone 4 (AUDIT = 20–40)")
)

ggplot(merged_data, aes(x = AUDIT_zone, fill = AUDIT_zone)) +
    geom_bar(color = "black") +
    
  
    stat_count(aes(label = paste0(round(..count../sum(..count..)*100, 1), "%")),
               geom = "text",
               vjust = -0.5,
               size = 6, fontface = "bold") +
    
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(
        "Zone 1 (AUDIT = 0–7)"  = "#A8DADC",
        "Zone 2 (AUDIT = 8–15)" = "#B7E4C7",
        "Zone 3 (AUDIT = 16–19)"= "#CDB4DB",
        "Zone 4 (AUDIT = 20–40)"= "#FFADAD"
    )) +
    
    labs(title = "AUDIT Score Distribution by Clinical Zones",
         x = "AUDIT Zones",
         y = "Count") +
    
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "none",
        axis.title = element_text(size = 20,face = "bold"),
   
        axis.text = element_text(size = 16,face = "bold")
    )
```


```{r,echo=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(gridExtra)




hist_gender <- ggplot(merged_data %>% 
                       filter(!is.na(audit_score), !is.na(gender)), 
                     aes(x = audit_score, fill = factor(gender, labels = c("Female", "Male")))) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, 
                 position = "identity", 
                 color = "black", 
                 alpha = 0.6) +

  geom_vline(xintercept = c(4, 8, 15), 
             color = "black", 
             linetype = "dashed", 
             linewidth = 0.8,
             alpha = 0.7) +

  geom_text(aes(x = 4, y = Inf, label = "4"), 
            vjust = -0.5, hjust = -0.2, color = "black", size = 4, fontface = "bold") +
  geom_text(aes(x = 8, y = Inf, label = "8"), 
            vjust = -0.5, hjust = -0.2, color = "black", size = 4, fontface = "bold") +
  geom_text(aes(x = 15, y = Inf, label = "15"), 
            vjust = -0.5, hjust = -0.2, color = "black", size = 4, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Female" = "#F8766D", "Male" = "#00BFC4"),
                    name = "Gender") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of AUDIT scores by Gender",
    x = "AUDIT score",
    y = "Number of individuals"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, max(merged_data$audit_score, na.rm = TRUE), by = 2)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = "top",
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray90"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

print(hist_gender)
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)


test_data <- merged_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(gender_binary), !is.na(audit_score))


t_test_result <- t.test(audit_score ~ gender_binary, data = test_data)
p_value <- t_test_result$p.value


format_p_value <- function(p) {
  if (p < 0.001) {
    return("p < 2.2e-16")
  } else {
    return(paste0("p = ", round(p, 3)))
  }
}

p_text <- format_p_value(p_value)


max_audit <- max(test_data$audit_score, na.rm = TRUE)

plot_b <- ggplot(merged_data, 
                 aes(x = factor(gender_binary, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("Female", "Male")), 
                     y = audit_score,
                     fill = factor(gender_binary))) +

  geom_hline(yintercept = c(4, 8, 15), 
             color = "darkgray", 
             linetype = "dashed", 
             linewidth = 0.7,
             alpha = 0.7) +

  annotate("text", x = 2.7, y = 4,  # Используем x = 2.7 чтобы текст был справа
           label = "4", 
           color = "black", 
           hjust = 0, 
           size = 3.5,
           fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("text", x = 2.7, y = 8, 
           label = "8", 
           color = "black", 
           hjust = 0, 
           size = 3.5,
           fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("text", x = 2.7, y = 15, 
           label = "15", 
           color = "black", 
           hjust = 0, 
           size = 3.5,
           fontface = "bold") +

  geom_boxplot(color = "black", width = 0.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
  # P-value 
  annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = max_audit * 1.08, 
           label = p_text, 
           size = 4.5, 
           fontface = "bold",
           color = "darkred") +

  
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#F8766D", "#69b3a2")) +
  labs(
    title = "b) Total AUDIT score",
    x = "Gender",
    y = "AUDIT score"
  ) +
 
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max_audit * 1.15),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))) +

  scale_x_discrete(expand = expansion(add = c(0.5, 0.8))) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 60, 20, 20)  
  )

print(plot_b)



```


```{r,echo=FALSE}
# Age statistics
if('age' %in% names(merged_data)) {
  print("\nAge statistics:")
  print(summary(merged_data$age))
  
  # Relationship between age and AUDIT
  plot(merged_data$age, merged_data$audit_score, 
       pch = 16, col = rgb(0, 0, 1, 0.5),
       xlab = "Age", 
       ylab = "AUDIT Total Score",
       main = "Relationship between Age and AUDIT Score")
  
  # Add correlation
  correlation <- cor(merged_data$age, merged_data$audit_score, 
                     use = "complete.obs")
  text(par("usr")[1] + 0.05 * diff(par("usr")[1:2]), 
       par("usr")[4] - 0.05 * diff(par("usr")[3:4]), 
       paste("Correlation:", round(correlation, 3)), 
       adj = c(0, 1))
}
```

ОПИСАНИЕ PRS

```{r,echo=FALSE}
pgs_summary <- read.csv("pgs_summary.csv", head = T)
print(pgs_summary[1:7])
```
